name: OpenAI API (GPT)
free_tier: Free $5 credit on signup; GPT-3.5-turbo extremely cheap (~$0.002/1K tokens)
best_use: Writing book descriptions, blog posts, email sequences, ad copy, and sales pages for PLT Press

name: Google Gemini API
free_tier: Free tier: 60 requests/min, 1.5M tokens/day on Gemini 2.0 Flash
best_use: Market research, competitor analysis, summarizing long documents, and content ideation

name: Hugging Face Inference API
free_tier: Free tier with rate limits; access to 200K+ models including text, image, audio
best_use: Sentiment analysis on reviews, text classification, and testing niche AI models for publishing workflows

name: Stability AI (Stable Diffusion)
free_tier: 25 free credits on signup; community models free via Hugging Face
best_use: Generating book covers, social media graphics, blog post images, and ad creatives

name: Groq API
free_tier: Free tier: 30 req/min on Llama 3 70B, 30K tokens/min
best_use: Rapid content drafting, real-time chatbot responses, and bulk text processing at speed

name: Anthropic Claude API
free_tier: Free credits on signup; Claude 3 Haiku very affordable for bulk tasks
best_use: Editing manuscripts, writing long-form content, strategic business planning, and detailed analysis

name: DeepL API
free_tier: Free tier: 500,000 characters/month
best_use: Translating book listings, marketing copy, and product descriptions for international markets

name: ElevenLabs API
free_tier: Free tier: 10,000 characters/month with 3 custom voices
best_use: Creating audiobook samples, voice-overs for book trailers, and podcast content

name: Mistral AI API
free_tier: Free tier available with rate limits on Mistral Small/Medium
best_use: Generating automation scripts, building publishing tools, and creating website features

name: OpenRouter
free_tier: Free models available (Llama, Mistral, Gemma); pay-per-use on premium models
best_use: Routing different tasks to the cheapest/best model — writing to one, coding to another, research to a third

name: Brave Search API
free_tier: Free tier: 2,000 queries/month
best_use: SEO keyword research, competitor monitoring, trending topic discovery, and backlink opportunities

name: Whisper (OpenAI) via Hugging Face
free_tier: Free via Hugging Face Inference API; self-host for unlimited
best_use: Transcribing podcast interviews, video content for blog repurposing, and meeting notes

name: Cloudflare Workers AI
free_tier: Free tier: 10,000 neurons/day (~100+ requests); text, image, speech models
best_use: Hosting a PLT Press chatbot, running AI at the edge for fast customer interactions

name: Replicate API
free_tier: Free credits on signup; community models free to run
best_use: Creating book trailer videos, animated social posts, and AI-generated marketing visuals

name: Resend API
free_tier: Free tier: 3,000 emails/month, 100 emails/day
best_use: Sending book launch emails, newsletter campaigns, and automated reader follow-ups

name: Notion API
free_tier: Free for personal use; API included with all plans
best_use: Managing editorial calendars, tracking book projects, scheduling social media content

name: Together AI API
free_tier: Free $5 credit on signup; open-source models at low cost
best_use: Bulk-processing book metadata, generating SEO descriptions, and batch content creation

name: PDF.co API
free_tier: Free tier: 100 credits/month
best_use: Generating invoices, media kits, book previews, and formatted PDF downloads for readers

name: Google Sheets API
free_tier: Free with Google account; generous quotas (300 req/min)
best_use: Tracking sales data, managing book inventory, automating royalty calculations and financial reports

name: Perplexity API
free_tier: Free credits on signup; Sonar models competitively priced
best_use: Finding podcast guest opportunities, identifying book reviewers, trending topic research, and lead generation
